description: Find-and-prove verifier: 2-phase majority-of-3 voting. Phase 1 (0.5 pts): agent's test FAILS on buggy code (>=2 of 3 runs must fail). Phase 2 (0.5 pts): after applying reference_fix.patch, agent's test PASSES (>=2 of 3 runs must pass). Agent test expected at /workspace/regression_test.go, run via 'go test -run TestRegression -v -timeout 60s'.

perfect_input.regression_test.go: Placed at /workspace/regression_test.go. Tests two regression scenarios: (1) cookie-based token extraction via grpcgateway-cookie header using flipt_client_token, and (2) server-level authentication bypass via WithServerSkipsAuthentication. On buggy code: both sub-tests fail because cookie extraction is not implemented and WithServerSkipsAuthentication does not exist. After reference_fix.patch: both sub-tests pass because the patch adds clientTokenFromMetadata with cookie support and the InterceptorOptions/WithServerSkipsAuthentication mechanism.

empty_input.regression_test.go: Empty file. Verifier checks -s (non-empty) and exits with 0.0 immediately.

scoring_notes.perfect: Phase 1: test calls authpkg.WithServerSkipsAuthentication which does not exist pre-patch -> compilation error -> test fails 3/3 -> phase1_pass=1 (0.5). Phase 2: after patch, both cookie extraction and server skip work -> test passes 3/3 -> phase2_pass=1 (0.5). Total: 1.0.
scoring_notes.empty: Empty file triggers the -s (non-empty) check in find_and_prove_verifier.sh line 45-48: 'Agent test is empty' -> write_score 0.0.
